title: TUI Shortcuts Help Overlay Execution Root
description: Shared non-runnable feature container for implementing, validating, documenting, and reviewing the shortcuts help overlay in the TUI without changing behavior outside the overlay flow.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing `?` toggles the shortcuts help overlay on and off reliably.
The overlay lists at least navigation, filter cycling, refresh, merge flow, and quit shortcuts.
Pressing `Esc` closes the overlay and returns to the previous focus state.
Refresh loop and merge state handling continue to work while the overlay feature exists.
Existing keybindings work as before after closing the overlay.
Tests cover help toggle and close behavior.
README includes a concise controls/help note.
